characters.name: Afina
characters.description: The Glitter Genie who lives in a glittery palace on a cloud in Rainbow Zahramay who the girls meet inAll That Glitters. She has a Glitter Gem Ring that can make glittery objects, glitter magic, and glitter-based magic weather such as a Glitternado and make things Glow-in-the Dark. Afina wears a pink dress with multi-colored glitter on it and a light shade of purple colored hair. She also has pink eyes, light pink eyeshadow, silver/gold bracelets on her wrists, a silver star design by her eye, and a pink pearl headdress with a blue gem pendant. Afina appears in the following episodes:

characters.name: Arabella
characters.description: ArabellaNameArabellaGenderFemaleSpeciesSeashell GenieAge9First appearanceJourney to Zahramay OceaneaVoiceCapri OliverArabellais Shimmer, Shine and Leah's genie in training. She lives in Zahramay Oceanea. Arabella is a a resident of Zahramay Oceanea who has a little trouble of using her genie magic. Fortunately during her times of visiting their palace on land, Shimmer, Shine and Leah tends to lend her a hand of taking control of her magic. She has brown skin, slightly dark purple hair, teal eyes, a yellow puffy jellyfish-like skirt, a clamshell pearl on her head, and gold bracelets.

characters.name: Ayla
characters.description: Ayla is a genie who runs a hair salon at the Azar Bazaar in Rainbow Zahramay who appears in "Hairdos and Don'ts". She has a magic comb that she wears in her hair that allows her to change the hair of anyone including herself. Leah, Shimmer, and Shine meet her while exploring the market place in Rainbow Zahramay. She gives Leah and her magical color changing  gems that change the person's hair color just by thinking of the color they want. Ayla offers to show them around the market place, however they are followed by Zeta and Nazboo who decided to spy on Leah and her Genies after coming to Rainbow Zahramay to buy potions. Zeta decides to steal Ayla's comb in order to use it to easily disguise herself. While showing them around Ayla hears a song she likes and convinces Leah and her genies to dance, changing her hair into a bob style she calls her dancing hair. Zeta tries take the opportunity to steal the comb, but trips while dancing and fails. Eventually Nazboo manages to steal the comb without Ayla noticing, allow Zeta to disguise herself as other genies to take things without anyone being the wiser. Ayla eventually discovers her comb is missing and reveals she needs to find it as she needs it for her hair salon as without it she won't be able to change her customer's hair. She was born on May 23, 2002.

characters.name: Bali the Nil
characters.description: Bali the NilNameBali the NilGenderFemaleSpeciesNilFirst appearanceAbraca-NopeVoiceDee Bradley BakerBali the Nilis a playful bird that lives in Rainbow Zahramay who the girls meet in "Abraca-nope". Bali is a Nil, a type of bird that unintentionally causes various types of magic to stop working when it is nearby. He got his name simply from the sounds he makes. Despite this Shine explains that they are friendly creatures that simply want to play and mean no harm. Bali causes the girls genie gem powered ship to stop working along with wish magic and levitation, though they manage to get it working after they realize Bali is the cause and Shine identifies Bali as a Nil. Though it unintentionally causes trouble when it follows the girls to the Azar Bazaar, Bali later helps the girls stop Zeta when she uses a laughing potion to incapacitate the genies in order to steal the Azar Gem, as Bali causes the magic of Zeta's potion to stop working.

characters.name: Bear
characters.description: The Bearis a bear that lives in theZahramay Forest A very curious Bear that appears whenZacwho is playing Detective uses a couple hotdogs to lure out a burglar he believes is responsible for the disappearance ofLeahand her genies, The Bear ends up chasing Zac andKazwhen he realizes where the hotdogs come from. He has orange and yellow fur, a pink nose, and pink eyes.

characters.description: BibiGenderFemaleSpeciesGenieAge23First appearance“Buddies in a Bottle”VoiceAshley BornancinBibiis a character inShimmer and Shine. She is a bottle maker who runs her own shop by the beach. She is responsible for making all the magic bottles in Zahramay Falls.

characters.name: Captain Zora
characters.description: Captain ZoraNormal2DGenderFemaleSpeciesGenieAge19First appearance"The Pirate Genie"VoiceKellie Pickler(Season 2)Kate Higgins(Season 3)Captain Zorais a supporting character inShimmer and Shine. Captain Zora is an adrenaline-loving pirate genie who is idolized byShine. She first appears in the two-part special "The Pirate Genie." Zora has good intentions but can be a little absentminded at times. She captains a pirate ship and has a magical pet named Scallywag, who is also her first mate. Shine loves pirate genies, especially Zora, so she gets nervous and usually can't talk around Zora. Zora has blue/purple eyes and dark purple hair. She wears a purple/blue sleeveless shirt, light blue shoulderpads, a red skirt, two belts around her torso and one around her waist, red/black striped stockings, matching striped gloves, and a dark purple/blue pirate hat with a light blue bow. Her boots have spurs shaped like skulls with bows on top of them.

characters.name: Cog
characters.description: Cogis a minor character and the former main antagonist inShimmer and Shineepisode "Underground Bound" A antagonisticGruntwho lives underground with the other Grunts in Zahramay Falls. Unlike the other Grunts he is a somewhat grumpy individual who dislikes digging and prefers to invent things like machines to make digging easy, though his inventions don't seem to work. He ends up finding Leah's Genie Bottle necklace after it fell off while Leah was swinging and uses it to help him dig. Purple fur with a lighter shade of purple colored tool belt.

characters.name: Cow
characters.description: The Cow is a minor character in the first season of Shimmer and Shine, only seen in the first episodeThe Sweetest Thing. She is a tan and brown cow with green eyes, a cowbell, and a long tufted tail. She is voiced byDee Bradley Baker.

characters.name: Dalia
characters.description: A genie who works as a Magic Carpet vendor and designer in Zahramay Falls whom Shimmer looks up to who appears in "Carpet Troubles". In addition to her stall in the marketplace, she has a workshop where she grows magic thread and weaves magic carpets using a Glitter Loom and her Weaving Wand. Dalia has purple hair and wears a blue/aqua colorled genie outfit. Dalia appears in the following episodes:

characters.description: Dotty is a white elephant with pink spots. She is the result of one of Leah's wishes going wrong. She likes to be in the carnival. She only appeared inMy Secret Genies/The First Wish. She doesn't speak at all.

Leah and her genies have to end up cleaning after him.

characters.name: Gazi
characters.description: GaziNameGaziGenderMaleSpeciesAxolotlFirst appearanceTrick or TreasureVoiceAria CapriaGazi is a minor character and a minor villain ofShimmer and Shine. A shape-changing sea critter, who loves to horde treasure and greedily tries to steal the treasure found by Nila, Leah, and her genies. However after working with the girls to deal with a seemingly hungryZahramay Shark, the girls manage to teach him it is better to share with others and befriends them Gazi is an axolotl looking sea creature with a pink head that has three light pink horns on each side, blue eyes with an orange-yellowish mouth with two nostrils, pink body with an orangey yellow stomach,a light pink fin that goes from just above his head to his pink tail, and orange-yellowish paws with purple claws

characters.name: Gigi
characters.description: GigiNameGigiGenderFemaleSpeciesSorceress (Formerly)GenieAge26First appearance"Zeta's Sister"VoiceFarnaz Esnaashari-CharmatzGigiis a recurring character. She isZeta's older sister. She used to be a sorceress, but she became a genie after graduating from genie school. She is voiced byFarnaz Esnaashari-Charmatz, the creator ofShimmer and Shine. Genie Gigi first appears in "Zeta's Sister" as the main focus of the episode. She used to be a sneaky, scheming sorceress just like Zeta. However, when she got older, she stopped using potions and tricks. She found that being nice to others was much better. Zeta thinks Gigi is annoying at first but later comes to like Gigi's new leaf.

characters.name: Gleam
characters.description: A blue glitter Zoomicorn native to Rainbow Zahramay. Gleam appears in the following episodes:

characters.name: Gobi the Glob
characters.description: An animated glob of Gooey Gummy Genie Jelly candy accidentally created by Leah and her genies. Gobi is created when a chunk of Gooey Gummy Genie Jelly fell into a potion that had spilled when a storm called a Glitternado  hit Shimmer and Shine's palace. He was named by Leah. Gobi is both friendly and curious, but is also very sticky, which causes objects and people to stick to him quite easily. He is shown to have a naïve and childlike personality. He is also quite bouncy and can stretch his arms, though his stickiness can sometimes cause problems. However, when the Glitternado hits Zahramay Falls Market Place, he helps Leah and her genies rescue some genies that had gotten pulled into the storm by using his stickiness.

characters.name: Imma
characters.description: ImmaNormal2DGenderFemaleSpeciesGenieFirst appearance"Rainbow Zahramay: Part 1"VoiceGrace KaufmanImmais a recurring character inShimmer and Shine. Imma is the waterfall genie who lives in Rainbow Zahramay and controls the rainbow waterfall that flows through the entire town. She owns a staff that has the power to open and close the Rainbow Gates. She is very protective of her staff and talks to it like it is a person. She is very talkative and doesn't seem to realize when she keeps talking on and on. She is also forgetful, sometimes forgetting what she is saying mid-sentence. Imma takes things questions very literally, and she always clarifies after telling another genie something, "At least, I don't know what else[something]would be!"

characters.name: Kaz
characters.description: KazNameKazGenderMaleSpeciesGenieAge10First appearanceA Tree-mendous RescueVoiceJet JurgensmeyerMatthew MucciHarrison NobleKazIs a main character in shimmer and shine who is also the genie ofZac's starting in season 2 Kaz is a male genie. He is a long-time friend of Shimmer and Shine. He had never met a non-magical person before Leah and Zac arrived in Zahramay Falls. In "A Tree-mendous Rescue", Princess Samira assigns Kaz as Zac's genie. In "Zany Ziffilon", after revealing his desire to have a Ziffilon as his magical pet, Zac wishes for a Ziffilon for Kaz. In most of his appercances that focus on Kaz, he is never seen without Zac. Kaz has purple hair and blue eyes. He wears a blue/teal outfit, golden bracelets with dark blue gems on each arm, and a pair of yellow shoes.

characters.name: Layla
characters.description: LaylaGenderFemaleSpeciesIce GenieAge21First appearance"Freeze-amay Falls"VoiceDanica McKellarLaylais a supporting character inShimmer and Shine. Layla is an ice genie. For a very long time, she resided inside a bottle buried on the coast of Zahramay Falls.Shimmer,Shine, andLeahfound the bottle and freed Layla. Afterwards, they let her live in the local ice palace. Layla has purple eyes and blonde hair that is almost always frozen over with a layer of blue ice. She wears a blue/purple dress with pink ice crystals on it and a matching necklace.
